positive: A stylized minimalist rendition of a mountain range meeting a calm lake at dawn. The scene should feature clean, bold silhouettes of pine trees and distant peaks against a gradient sky of soft coral, deep indigo, and pale lavender. The composition must be central and symmetrical, utilizing negative space effectively. The style should emulate Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) meets modern graphic design, with strong lines and limited, harmonious color blocking. Perfect for screen printing on apparel, featuring clean, vector-like edges and high contrast between the dark foreground silhouettes and the bright sky. Overall feeling of tranquility and adventure.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logos, signatures, cluttered, complex, photo, photorealism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, gradient distortion, muted colors
